text: Here's what science actually says about iron hemoglobin. Hemoglobin is the protein in red blood cells transporting oxygen. But did you know iron is its secret weapon? Without iron, hemoglobin can't bind oxygen. Low iron means low oxygen in your body's cells. Studies show iron deficiency can lead to fatigue, weakness, and even cognitive issues. Crazy, right? So, ensuring adequate iron intake is vital for your health. What’s your iron source? Like and follow for more fascinating science insights!
